text: However, key risks temper enthusiasm. Revenue growth has fluctuated significantly across recent quarters, declining 0.93% in Q1 2025, surging 7.22% in Q2 2025, then moderating to just 0.91% in Q3 2025. This volatility raises questions about growth sustainability. Financial leverage presents material risk, with a debt-to-equity ratio of 1.78x that has increased 7.9% over the past year. Additionally, the proposed Visa-Mastercard settlement over interchange fees could potentially affect rewards credit card dynamics across the payments industry, creating competitive uncertainty for American Express.
